gist.headline: Curating the garden
gist.blurb: We've fine-tuned the GitHub profile validation for the Seed tier to ensure our community garden grows with the highest quality contributors.
gist.summary: Adjusted the GitHub profile scoring threshold for automatic Seed tier upgrades to improve validation accuracy.
gist.impact: This ensures fairer usage of the platform's resources by refining the criteria for automatic tier upgrades, alongside updated frontend tooltips for clarity.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a careful gardener, inspecting seeds with a magnifying glass to ensure only the best ones are planted. A cute robot companion holds a checklist.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully inspecting glowing seeds with a magnifying glass. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a pixelated checklist. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
